title: Decoherence: The Loss of Quantum Information
description: Understand decoherence - the process by which quantum systems lose their quantum properties through environmental interactions, and learn about T1 and T2 timescales.
learningObjectives: Explain the physical mechanism of decoherence
Distinguish between T1 (relaxation) and T2 (dephasing) processes
Calculate decoherence timescales for simple systems
Model amplitude damping and phase damping channels
Analyze how decoherence limits quantum computation
